free_text: Elastic scattering of 26.3 and 30 MeV protons.
Subentry 012 is corrected.  Other minor
corrections are included for other subentries also.
Date is corrected
REFERENCE Is corrected.
CRITIQUE From N.Otsuka is included.
Last checking has been done.
Self-supporting foils of Ca, Ni, Pb, the exception of
Ca were isotopically enriched. The targets were all
approximately 1.0-1.5 MeV thick except for those
measurements at angles backward of 115-120 degrees
where reflection setting of the target was used and
target thicknesses equivalent to 0.3 MeV for Ni-58
and Ni-60 and 1 MeV for Ca and Pb-208 were used.
.Optical model analysis.
.The two Ne102 plastic scintillators for beam
monitoring.
.The four NaI(Tl) scintillation counters for
scattered protons.
.Details of
experiments.

power" of used target, but not polarization.
.The uncertainty is reported by authors in
data table without an analysis.
